revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/interwikis, add JA text & EN link
Bot: tidy cats/IWs, add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with Japanese origin and translated names
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Jawiki pages with translated titles
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to " "
Bot: remove empty section(s)
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=13th-century_Japanese_people_by_occupation here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive.
